description: Length-matched V2 facts for origin of life domain.

facts.context: The RNA World hypothesis proposes that early life used:
facts.truth: RNA as both genetic material and catalyst
distractors: DNA as the first genetic polymer on Earth
proteins as primary replicators before RNA
clay minerals as the main replicating system

facts.context: The key challenge in abiogenesis research is explaining the:
facts.truth: transition from prebiotic chemistry to replication
distractors: direct evolution of DNA from simple amino acids
preference of carbon chemistry over silicon-based
geological dating of first cellular organisms

facts.truth: amino acids form from simple gases under electric discharge
distractors: complete cells assemble from inorganic precursor chemicals
nucleic acid polymers arise from volcanic mineral catalysis
biological life requires pre-existing living cellular matter

facts.context: LUCA (Last Universal Common Ancestor) was likely:
facts.truth: already complex with hundreds of protein-coding genes
distractors: a minimal self-replicating strand of naked RNA alone
a membrane-free aggregate with no genetic information
encoding proteins with a radically different codon table

facts.context: Hydrothermal vent origin hypotheses propose vents provide:
facts.truth: chemical gradients and mineral catalysts for synthesis
distractors: thermal energy only, with no relevant chemical inputs
environments far too extreme for organic bond formation
fully assembled protocells expelled from vent chimneys

facts.truth: prebiotic synthesis yields equal left- and right-handed forms
distractors: biological organisms incorporate both chiralities in equal ratio
fundamental physics mandates one mirror form over the opposite
researchers have identified the definitive amplification pathway

facts.context: The metabolism-first vs genetics-first debate concerns:
facts.truth: whether autocatalytic energy cycles preceded information storage
distractors: which of the known metabolic pathways evolved most recently
whether contemporary cells require metabolic enzyme networks
the geological era when oxidative phosphorylation first arose

facts.context: The phosphorus problem in prebiotic chemistry is that:
facts.truth: phosphate minerals dissolve poorly, limiting bioavailable phosphorus
distractors: phosphorus compounds were abundant in early ocean water globally
early biochemistry operated entirely without phosphorus backbone
phosphorus became biologically relevant only in recent geological time

facts.truth: fatty acid amphiphiles self-assembling into vesicles
distractors: protein-based cell walls erected by early ribosomes
mineral surfaces providing rigid permanent compartments
freely diffusing molecules without any compartment boundary

facts.context: Ribozymes support the RNA World hypothesis by showing RNA can:
distractors: store genetic sequences but perform no catalysis
fold into structures without any enzymatic function
accelerate only ribosomal peptide bond formation

facts.truth: life seeded Earth from space but origin remains unexplained
distractors: terrestrial abiogenesis produced all life independently
extraterrestrial delivery resolves how life first originated
meteorite analysis has conclusively falsified the hypothesis

facts.context: Autocatalytic sets are important because they demonstrate:
facts.truth: self-sustaining chemical networks without genetic templates
distractors: genetic polymers necessarily preceded all metabolic cycles
catalytic acceleration requires folded protein-based enzymes
sustained chemical cycling demands an external genetic program
